summary: Completed frontend testing of the redesigned VitalsModal component. All color themes, tabs, forms, and functionality working correctly. Minor SVG polyline console warning found but not affecting visual rendering.

design_issues.issue: Console warning: SVG polyline points attribute using percentage values (e.g., '0%,38%') which is non-standard. SVG polyline expects numeric values, not percentages.
design_issues.impact: Visual rendering works correctly in browsers tested, but console shows error messages
design_issues.suggested_fix: Use viewBox with numeric coordinates or calculate actual pixel positions

passed_tests: VitalsModal opens from Caregiver Dashboard when clicking any vital card (BP, Heart, Temp, Pain)
VitalsModal opens from Family Dashboard when clicking any vital card
Blood Pressure tab: pink/maroon theme (#e91e7a), dual-line graph with systolic (pink) and diastolic (orange) dots
Heart Rate tab: orange theme (#f97316), single line graph
Temperature tab: blue theme (#3b82f6), single line graph with °F values
Pain Level tab: purple theme (#8b5cf6), dot chart with values 0-10
Log New Reading button appears ONLY for Caregiver users (isCaregiver=true)
Log New Reading button correctly HIDDEN for Family users (isCaregiver=false)
BP Log New Reading form shows Systolic and Diastolic input fields (data-testid: vital-systolic, vital-diastolic)
HR Log New Reading form shows single input field (data-testid: vital-heartrate)
Temp Log New Reading form shows single input field (data-testid: vital-temperature)
Pain Log New Reading form shows single input field (data-testid: vital-pain)
Current Reading card shows correct themed background color for each vital type
Weekly trend chart displays all 7 days (Mon-Sun) on x-axis
Recent History section shows color-coded values matching tab theme
BP history shows systolic/diastolic in pink (#e91e7a)
HR history shows values in orange (#f97316)
Temp history shows values with °F in blue (#3b82f6)
Pain history shows values with /10 in purple (#8b5cf6)
Modal closes with X button (data-testid: vitals-close-btn)
Modal closes when clicking outside the modal
Tab navigation works via data-testid selectors (vital-tab-bp, vital-tab-hr, vital-tab-temp, vital-tab-pain)
action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix SVG polyline points attribute to use numeric values instead of percentage strings to eliminate console warnings
critical_code_review_comments: VitalsModal.jsx:154-158, 223-227, 244-248, 267-271 - SVG polyline points using percentage strings which is non-standard but browsers handle gracefully
seed_data_creation: None - app uses mock data from mockData.js

mocked_apis_list: All vitals data from INITIAL_VITALS in /app/frontend/src/services/mockData.js
heartRate: 7 days of data, latest: 72 bpm

context_for_next_testing_agent: VitalsModal redesign fully tested. Key data-testids: vitals-close-btn, vital-tab-{bp|hr|temp|pain}, log-new-reading-btn, vital-systolic, vital-diastolic, vital-heartrate, vital-temperature, vital-pain, vital-save-btn. isCaregiver prop controls Log New Reading button visibility. SVG charts use custom polylines and circles for visualization. Console warnings about polyline points are cosmetic only.
